🔴 Live Room Settings LIVE
Live Room Name

Max Concurrent Viewers

Only ticket holders can view the stream

Allow embeddable player on partner sites
🌍 Multi-Language Subtitles (AI)
Auto-generate subtitles in 12+ languages
⚠️ Ensure your internet connection supports at least 20 Mbps upload for stable HD streaming. We recommend a wired LAN connection.

About G+ Events
The World's Stage
For Live Music

G+ Events is your ultimate destination for live music, concerts, festivals and events worldwide. We connect fans with their favourite artists through immersive live and digital experiences.

2.4M+
Active Fans
847
Live Events
12K+
Artists
150+
Countries
🎯
Our Mission

To democratise access to live music and entertainment by connecting fans, artists, venues, and event organisers through a seamless, innovative platform — no matter where you are in the world.

🔭
Our Vision

A world where every fan can experience the magic of live music, and every artist has the tools to share their art globally — built on the power of community, technology and passion for music.

What We Offer
🎫
Buy & Manage Tickets
Seamless ticket purchasing, QR codes, and seat management for events worldwide.
📡
Live Streaming
Watch live concerts and events from anywhere in HD — no travel needed.
🎤
Artist Discovery
Find and follow your favourite artists, get alerts for new shows and releases.
🏟️
Venue Listings
Browse and book top venues for events. Perfect for organisers and fans.
💼
Hire Freelancers
Connect with photographers, DJs, videographers, MCs and more for your events.
📢
Announce Events
Powerful tools to promote and publish events to millions of fans worldwide.

🤝 Collaborate With Us
Partner With G+ Events

Whether you're an artist, venue, brand, or event organiser — join our growing ecosystem and reach millions of music fans worldwide.

Share your music, promote tours, sell tickets and connect with fans globally.
